portfolio.title: Modern Living Room
portfolio.summary: Bright, balanced interior photography that makes the living space feel open, polished, and listing-ready.
portfolio.description: Interior coverage focuses on clean composition, natural-feeling light, and accurate room flow so buyers can understand the home before they ever step inside.
portfolio.alt: Bright modern living room prepared for a real estate listing

portfolio.title: Waterfront Exterior
portfolio.summary: Exterior listing imagery that highlights curb appeal, setting, and the first impression buyers see online.
portfolio.description: Exterior sessions are built around the strongest angles of the property, with attention to light, approach, landscaping, and the features that make the listing stand out.
portfolio.alt: Waterfront home exterior photographed for a real estate listing

gallery.alt: Waterfront home exterior from the listing approach
gallery.caption: Primary exterior listing image

gallery.alt: Front exterior approach of a residential listing
gallery.caption: Front approach and curb appeal

portfolio.title: Marsh View Aerial
portfolio.summary: FAA-licensed drone imagery that gives buyers a clearer sense of land, water, location, and surrounding context.
portfolio.description: Aerial media is especially useful for waterfront homes, acreage, golf communities, and properties where the location is part of the value story.
portfolio.alt: Aerial view of marsh and Lowcountry landscape

gallery.alt: Aerial view of marsh and Lowcountry landscape
gallery.caption: Lowcountry aerial context

gallery.alt: Waterfront property exterior supporting the aerial story
gallery.caption: Exterior context from ground level

portfolio.title: Walkthrough Coverage
portfolio.summary: Smooth walkthrough coverage that helps buyers understand layout, movement, and the feel of the home.
portfolio.description: Video walkthroughs are structured to move through the property naturally, giving agents a stronger asset for MLS, social media, and listing pages.
portfolio.alt: Video walkthrough preview for a real estate listing

portfolio.title: Primary Bedroom Suite
portfolio.summary: Interior detail coverage for private spaces, suites, and secondary rooms that still need to feel intentional.
portfolio.description: Secondary interior coverage keeps the full listing consistent, using clean angles and balanced editing so each room contributes to the overall presentation.
portfolio.alt: Primary bedroom suite photographed for a real estate listing

portfolio.title: Front Approach
portfolio.summary: Clean front-exterior imagery for MLS thumbnails, listing headers, and the first photo buyers notice.
portfolio.description: The front approach is often the most important listing image. This coverage is designed to create a clear, inviting first impression.
